expectations.text: query-hook-path: 조회 훅이 hooks/apis/{domain}/queries/ 경로 아래에 배치된다
expectations.evidence: Hook file exists at hooks/apis/notification/queries/useGetNotifications/index.ts, which matches the hooks/apis/{domain}/queries/ pattern.
File is at hooks/apis/notification/queries/useGetNotifications/index.ts, exactly matching the hooks/apis/{domain}/queries/{hookName}/index.ts pattern.

expectations.text: no-fetch-in-component: NotificationList 컴포넌트에 직접적인 useEffect+fetch 패턴이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: NotificationList.tsx has no useEffect or fetch calls. It only imports and calls useGetNotifications hook. Data fetching is fully delegated to the hook.
NotificationList.tsx line 15: 'if (isLoading)' renders a loading skeleton with data-testid="notifications-loading".
NotificationList.tsx line 25: 'if (error)' renders an error message with data-testid="notifications-error".
NotificationList.tsx line 65: 'filteredNotifications.length === 0' renders an empty state with data-testid="notifications-empty" and message '알림이 없습니다'.

expectations.text: hook-use-prefix: query 훅 이름이 useGet 접두사를 사용한다
expectations.evidence: Hook is named 'useGetNotifications' (index.ts line 17), which uses the 'useGet' prefix.
index.ts line 17: 'const useGetNotifications = () => {' — defined as an arrow function assigned to a const.
